subtitle: What I'm focused on right now.

sections.heading: Research
sections.body: Working at the [Wellman Center for Photomedicine](https://octresearch.org) (Harvard Medical School / MGH). Building interferometric imaging systems, writing inverse models, and prototyping a broadband micro-LED source.

sections.heading: PhD applications
sections.body: Preparing applications for Fall 2027. Looking at groups working on quantum information, quantum networks and photonic interconnects, and entanglement distribution between spin-based quantum nodes.

sections.heading: Podcast
sections.body: Developing a science podcast exploring how fundamental physics innovation translates into technologies that solve grand challenges in health, energy, and information. Currently in pre-production: building the guest pipeline, production stack, and first episode scripts.

sections.heading: Ventures
sections.body: Thinking about deep-tech companies in photonics, quantum sensing, and AI. Nothing to announce yet.

sections.heading: Learning
sections.body: Quantum computing fundamentals, Lean 4 theorem proving, advanced fiber optics, and the business mechanics of deep-tech company formation.
